category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides user-space interfaces to POSIX 1003.1e capabilities.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project information page and the best supplied documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.source-archive is hosted under kernel.org pub/linux/libs/security/linux-privs/libcap2, indicating the official kernel.org libcap distribution; corresponding official source-control location is kernel.org libcap.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies POSIX capabilities; source_facts.executables lists capsh, getcap, getpcaps, and setcap.
